body:
## Rationale

Jaska Raatikainen (jaska-raatikainen-drum-setup kit page exists) shows GSC signal: 'jaska raatikainen drum set' at 50% CTR / pos 9.5. Zero album-specific articles for him. Children of Bodom has dedicated fanbase with consistent melodic death metal search volume.

**'Hate Crew Deathroll' (2003)** is CoB's commercial and critical peak. Jaska used Tama Starclassic Maple + Paiste 2002 era gear — distinct from current kit. Extends the existing profile article into editorial depth.

## Files to touch

- packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js — add new entry
- public/llms/articles/hate-crew-deathroll-drum-setup.md — LLM companion file

## Slug

hate-crew-deathroll-drum-setup

## Template shape

drummer: Jaska Raatikainen, drummerSlug: jaska-raatikainen, band: Children of Bodom, album: Hate Crew Deathroll, year: 2003, genre: Melodic Death Metal

Gear: Tama Starclassic Maple, Paiste 2002 cymbals (16/18 crash, 20 ride, 18 china), Paiste Sound Edge 14 hats, Tama Iron Cobra double pedal, Vic Firth 5A

FAQs: What drums did Jaska use on Hate Crew Deathroll? / What pedals does he play? / What is the drumming style on this album?

relatedAlbums: ['jaska-raatikainen-drum-setup']

## Quality gate

- 300+ words
- 3+ FAQ Q&A pairs
- 3+ internal links (profile, band page, gear item)
- JSON-LD: Article + MusicAlbum + FAQPage
- LLM companion file in public/llms/articles/

## Estimated organic uplift

- 'jaska raatikainen drum set' 50% CTR at pos 9.5 — article pushes to pos 7 or better
- Opens Children of Bodom / melodic death metal cluster (no CoB articles exist)
- Long-tail: 'children of bodom drum kit', 'hate crew deathroll recording gear'

## Verify

1. grep 'hate-crew-deathroll' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js returns new entry
2. curl metalforge.io/articles/hate-crew-deathroll-drum-setup shows Jaska content in HTML
3. sitemap.xml includes the new slug
4. JSON-LD passes schema validation
5. public/llms/articles/hate-crew-deathroll-drum-setup.md exists

## Done

Close when article is live, schema valid, in sitemap.
title: SEO: Jaska Raatikainen — Children of Bodom 'Hate Crew Deathroll' drum setup article (2003, GSC signal)
